seoTitle: Kurumbul vs Kuttabul — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kurumbul and Kuttabul. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kurumbul and Kuttabul.
heading: Kurumbul vs Kuttabul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kurumbul, Queensland and Kuttabul, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kurumbul has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kuttabul (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kurumbul or Kuttabul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kurumbul has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Kuttabul scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kurumbul scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Kuttabul scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kurumbul or Kuttabul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kurumbul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
